parameters.query:
INSERT INTO project_health_state (task_id, task_name, total_budget_hours, hours_logged, current_state) 
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) 
ON CONFLICT (task_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
    hours_logged = EXCLUDED.hours_logged, 
    current_state = EXCLUDED.current_state, 
    last_checked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
